{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Aethertech vault
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Nebula Runners]] are transporting an [[Aethertech vault]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator hid behind an [[Aethertech vault]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
